scripts.test:all: bun run test:prepare && bun run test:run
scripts.test:unit: bun run test:use-case && bun run test:policy
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test bun test -t INTEGRATION
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test
scripts.check:e2e: bun run check:env:test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check:env:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development bun scripts/check-env.ts && bun run check:db-isolation
scripts.check:env:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test bun scripts/check-env.ts && bun run check:db-isolation
scripts.check:env:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production bun scripts/check-env.ts && bun run check:db-isolation
scripts.metrics: bun run metrics:cloc && bun run metrics:depcruise && bun run metrics:analysis
scripts.check:static: bun run barrels && bun run lint:fix && bun run format:fix && bun run metrics && bun run depcruise && bun run typecheck
scripts.check: bun run check:env && bun run check:static && bun run test:unit && bun run build && echo 'All checks passed!'
scripts.check:test: bun run check:env:test && bun run check:static && bun run test:unit && bun run build && echo 'All checks passed (test)!'
scripts.check:prod: bun run check:env:prod && bun run check:static && bun run test:unit && bun run build && echo 'All checks passed (prod)!'
scripts.check:all: bun run check:env:test && bun run check:static && bun run build && bun run test && bun run test:e2e && echo 'All backend checks passed!'
scripts.db:migrate:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npx prisma migrate deploy --schema src/generic-subdomains/persistance/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:reset:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed --schema src/generic-subdomains/persistance/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:drop:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma db push --force-reset
scripts.db:drop:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npx prisma db push --force-reset --schema src/generic-subdomains/persistance/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.docker:up: bun run docker:build && bun run docker:run
